metadata.description: IRS Required Minimum Distribution tables and SECURE 2.0 start age rules
metadata.uniform_lifetime_source: IRS Publication 590-B, Appendix B, Table III (updated 2022)
metadata.notes: Uniform Lifetime Table is used when the sole beneficiary is not a spouse more than 10 years younger. Joint Life Expectancy Table (Table II) is not yet implemented.

uniform_lifetime_table.description: Maps owner age to distribution period (divisor). RMD = prior year-end balance / divisor.

start_age_rules.description: SECURE 2.0 Act phased-in RMD start ages based on birth year
